hero.tagline: I build high-performance, AI-augmented web applications with React, Next.js, and TypeScript.

about.title: About Me
about.lead: AI-Enhanced Software Engineer turning complex requirements into fast, accessible, production-ready interfaces.
about.body: 5+ years building scalable full-stack web applications. I specialize in React, Next.js, TypeScript and component-driven architectures, with a strong focus on performance, accessibility, and developer experience. I leverage GenAI tooling (Copilot, ChatGPT, Claude) to accelerate delivery without compromising on craft, type safety, or test coverage.

portfolio.title: Selected Work
portfolio.subtitle: Side projects exploring full-stack patterns and developer tooling.

nextFood.name: Next Food
nextFood.description: Community recipe-sharing platform built on the Next.js App Router — browse, share, and discover meals from a food-loving community.

portfolioBuilder.name: Portfolio Builder
portfolioBuilder.description: Generator that turns user data into a customized portfolio site, with Redux Toolkit driving a clean, maintainable state layer.

strategyFilter.name: Strategy Filter
strategyFilter.description: A compact TypeScript utility for filtering and composing strategy patterns — focused on clean abstractions and type-safe APIs.

eLearningSystem.name: E-Learning System
eLearningSystem.description: Full-stack digital learning platform replacing paper-based tutorials with managed courses, content delivery, and student workflows.

resumeBuilder.name: Resume Builder
resumeBuilder.description: Responsive React resume builder — generate a CV from a GitHub username or craft a custom layout, then export to PDF with accessibility built in.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I use to ship production software.

aamir.quote: I feel myself lucky to have a friend like you. You are having a very great problem solving skills and backend implementations. With the help of you I had explore myself how to solve competitive programming questions. Best of luck my friend
aamir.author: Aamir Thekiya

mohsin.quote: Working with you is like learning and implementing the real time projects. Your logics for implementing the backend is very amazing. Without your support It was impossible to develop highly scaled projects. I wish you all the best for your future and hoping to meet and work in future with you
mohsin.author: Mohsin Essani

diploma.title: Diploma in Information Technology

bachelor.title: B.E. in Information Technology
bachelor.organization: M.H. Saboo Siddik College of Engineering

mitr.title: Software Engineer (Band 1)
mitr.description: Built a 20+ component library, cut load times 25% via code splitting and image optimization, and reached 95% test coverage with Jest, RTL, and Playwright.

deloitte.title: Software Engineer II
deloitte.description: Architecting scalable Next.js + Vite apps with SSR/SSG (+20pt Lighthouse), a 30+ component design system, RTK Query data layers, and 90%+ coverage across 30k+ LOC.
